one_line_definition: Ratio of induced charge density to applied stress (or strain per applied field), fundamental parameter for actuator/sensor sensitivity

Product of material density and acoustic wave velocity (MRayl); governs reflection/transmission at interfaces

PZT formulation with higher piezoelectric activity and dielectric constant but higher losses; suited for high-sensitivity applications

Ratio of lateral strain to axial strain under uniaxial stress
